title: [Spire, Fourth Floor Landing]
description: Set upon a wide landing, a small study has been arranged, its stone kept clean and free of dust, lending the space a quiet sense of care.  Slender arrow-slit windows fitted with panes of sky blue and silver glass filter soft, shifting light across a delicate writing desk and wooden stool.  Fine nicks still mark the frame of the door that stands opposite, though their edges have been smoothed with age and use.  Nearby, a spiraling stone staircase winds both up and down, vanishing into shadow below even as it rises toward the next level.
